title: AGI is FAKE: The Biggest AI Lie Exposed
summary: The video argues that current AI models have fundamental mathematical limitations preventing AGI, citing the Time Hierarchy Theorem, transformer architecture constraints, and error accumulation in autonomous agents. It contends that AGI predictions are overhyped despite viral AI agent demos and optimistic keynotes.
